hero.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Auto Repair Experts
hero.subheadline: From brake pads to transmission rebuilds, we keep your car running safely and reliably. Honest service, fair prices, and a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty on all repairs.

featureSections.title: Complete Repair & Maintenance Under One Roof
featureSections.body: Whether it's a routine oil change or a complex engine overhaul, our certified technicians have the skills and equipment to handle it all. We service all makes and models, using quality parts and state-of-the-art diagnostics.
bullets: Advanced diagnostic tools for accurate repairs
Free multi-point inspection with every service
featureSections.cardBody: Squealing brakes? We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and lines to restore stopping power. Most brake jobs completed same day.

featureSections.title: No Surprises, Just Quality Work
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication. Before any work begins, we provide a detailed estimate and explain what's needed. You'll never get upsold on unnecessary repairs.
bullets: Digital photos and video of findings
Customer approval required before additional work
Competitive rates with no hidden fees
featureSections.cardBody: We use the latest scan tools to pinpoint issues quickly. No guesswork, no wasted time — just accurate diagnostics and effective repairs.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Linares difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, Linares Auto Repair delivers expert service for all makes and models. Every job is backed by our commitment to quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction.

services.title: Brake Repair & Service
services.shortDescription: Expert brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and full brake system repairs.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your car’s most critical safety system. At Linares Auto, we perform thorough inspections of pads, rotors, calipers, brake lines, and fluid. We recommend the right solution for your driving style and budget, ensuring reliable stopping power. Most brake services are completed the same day.
benefits: Peace of mind with a 12-month warranty

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check caliper function and fluid levels.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We provide a detailed estimate with options — from economy to premium parts — and explain what's needed.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We replace worn components, bleed the system if needed, and test drive to confirm smooth operation.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Most pads last 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We check them during every visit and let you know when it's time.

faqs.question: Do you resurface rotors or replace them?
faqs.answer: We recommend resurfacing if the rotor is thick enough and not warped. Otherwise, we replace with high-quality rotors for optimal performance.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced computer diagnostics to identify and fix check engine lights, performance issues, and more.
services.longDescription: Modern vehicles rely on complex computer systems. Our technicians use professional-grade scanners to read trouble codes and perform live data analysis. We pinpoint the root cause — from faulty sensors to mechanical failures — and provide a clear repair plan. No guesswork, no unnecessary parts.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Resolves check engine light and drivability issues

process.title: Code Reading
process.description: We connect our diagnostic tool to retrieve all trouble codes and freeze-frame data.

process.title: System Testing
process.description: We perform component tests, voltage checks, and visual inspections to confirm the fault.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: After repairs, we clear codes and test drive to ensure the issue is resolved.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose an intermittent problem?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use advanced tools that record data over time to catch intermittent faults. We may ask you to leave the car for a day or two.

faqs.question: Will you clear my check engine light without fixing it?
faqs.answer: No, we believe in fixing the underlying issue. Clearing codes without repair only masks the problem.

services.title: Transmission Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Fluid changes, filter replacements, and full transmission rebuilds for automatic and manual transmissions.
services.longDescription: Whether you need a simple fluid change or a complete rebuild, our transmission specialists have the expertise to get you back on the road. We service both automatic and manual transmissions, using high-quality fluids and parts. Our rebuilds include a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.
benefits: Smooth shifting and extended transmission life

process.title: Fluid Check & Inspection
process.description: We check fluid level, condition, and look for leaks. A road test helps assess shift quality.

process.title: Service or Repair Plan
process.description: Based on findings, we recommend a flush, filter change, or internal repair. We explain all options.

process.title: Completion & Test
process.description: We perform the service or rebuild, refill with correct fluid, and test drive to confirm proper operation.

faqs.question: How often should I change transmission fluid?
faqs.answer: Most manufacturers recommend every 30,000-60,000 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask us during your next visit.

faqs.question: Do you rebuild transmissions or only replace them?
faqs.answer: We rebuild whenever possible — it's often more cost-effective and allows us to upgrade weak components. We only recommend replacement if the case is damaged.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Air conditioning recharge, compressor replacement, and heater repairs to keep you comfortable year-round.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. Our technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all climate control systems. We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, blend doors, and electrical components. From a simple recharge to a full system overhaul, we restore your comfort quickly.
benefits: Fast relief from uncomfortable cabin temperatures
Proper refrigerant handling for environmental safety
Extended system life with preventive maintenance

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant pressure, compressor operation, and inspect for leaks using UV dye and electronic detectors.

process.title: Diagnosis & Quote
process.description: We identify the faulty component and provide a fixed-price estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Repair & Performance Check
process.description: We repair or replace parts, evacuate and recharge the system, and verify temperatures meet specs.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a failing compressor, or a clogged condenser. We'll diagnose the exact issue.

faqs.question: Do you fix heater problems too?
faqs.answer: Yes, we repair heating systems including heater cores, blower motors, and thermostat issues. We handle both AC and heat.

about.headline: Family-Owned Auto Repair Serving Dallas Since 2005
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps our community safe on the road. We believe in transparency, fair pricing, and treating every customer like family.
story: Linares Auto Repair was founded in 2005 by master technician Carlos Linares, who saw a need for trustworthy auto care in the Dallas Design District. Starting with just two bays and a commitment to doing the job right the first time, Carlos built a reputation for honesty and skill. Word spread quickly, and soon Linares Auto became the go-to shop for neighbors who wanted reliable repairs without the dealer price tag.

Today, we've grown to a full-service facility with eight bays and a team of ASE-certified technicians. But our values haven't changed. We still take the time to explain every repair, provide upfront pricing, and stand behind our work with a solid warranty. Whether you drive a sedan, SUV, or truck, you'll get the same personal attention that made us a Dallas institution.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend repairs you don't need. Our estimates are thorough, and we always get your approval before starting work.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications. Every repair is tested and backed by a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: We explain issues in plain language, show you photos or videos of the problem, and provide digital invoices with detailed line items.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a family-owned business, we support local schools and charities. We treat every customer like a neighbor, not a number.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Linares Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: We're here to answer your questions and schedule your service. Call, email, or stop by our shop.
